channel.title: FilmyChill — New Movies & OTT This Week in Germany
channel.description: What's worth watching this week in Germany — new theatre and OTT releases with ratings and verdicts. Updated twice daily.

item.title: Hijamat — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · German · Just released — verdict soon — Fifty-year-old Murad’s life is shaken to the core when he learns that his younger brother is gay.

item.title: Bleach — Disney Plus
item.description: Disney Plus · Japanese · ★ 8.4 · Must watch — For as long as he can remember, Ichigo Kurosaki has been able to see ghosts. But when he meets Rukia, a Soul Reaper who battles evil spirits known as Hollows,…

item.title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Japanese · ★ 8.5 · Must watch — When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every…

item.title: Die Landarztpraxis – Team Sonnenhof — Disney Plus
item.description: Disney Plus · German · Not enough ratings yet

item.title: 23 000 Lives — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · German · Just released — verdict soon — Unable to stand by and watch as countless refugees lose their lives attempting to reach Europe by sea, a group of young Berliners take action.

item.title: !efliH — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · German · Just released — verdict soon

item.title: Silo — Apple TV
item.description: Apple TV · English · ★ 8.2 · Must watch — In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously,…

item.title: X-Men '97 — Disney Plus
item.description: Disney Plus · English · ★ 8.6 · Must watch — The X-Men, a band of mutants who use their uncanny gifts to protect a world that hates and fears them, are challenged like never before, forced to face a…

item.title: Enola Holmes 3 — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · English · ★ 7.0 · Worth a watch — Adventure follows detective Enola Holmes to Malta, where her plans to tie the knot unravel when Sherlock's disappearance plunges her into a perilous case.

item.title: Bad Boyfriends - Jetzt wird abgerechnet — RTL+
item.description: RTL+ · German · Not enough ratings yet

item.title: Der Leerlauf — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · German · Not enough ratings yet — A guy opens himself up in a therapy session.

item.title: Enhanced – Die Dopingspiele: Zwischen Medizin, Moral und Milliarden — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · German · Not enough ratings yet — The controversial Enhanced Games challenge the foundations of modern sport by allowing athletes to use performance-enhancing drugs in pursuit of world records…

item.title: The Bear — Disney Plus
item.description: Disney Plus · English · ★ 8.1 · Must watch — Carmy, a young fine-dining chef, comes home to Chicago to run his family sandwich shop. As he fights to transform the shop and himself, he works alongside a…

item.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · English · ★ 7.8 · Must watch — A young boy known as the Avatar must master the four elemental powers to save a world at war — and fight a ruthless enemy bent on stopping him.

item.title: House of the Dragon — WOW
item.description: WOW · English · ★ 8.4 · Must watch — The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights.

item.title: Toy Story 5 — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 7.4 · Worth a watch — When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they…

item.title: Obsession — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 8.3 · Must watch — After breaking the mysterious "One Wish Willow" to win his crush's heart, a hopeless romantic finds himself getting exactly what he asked for but soon…
